heading: Administrative costs
label: 11378 Administrative costs
text: A recipient may use up to 7.5 percent of any annual grant received under this part for administrative purposes. A recipient State shall share the amount available for administrative purposes pursuant to the preceding sentence with local governments funded by the State.
notes: Amendments2009— substituted “7.5 percent” for “5 percent”.Pub. L. 111–22

Effective Date of 2009 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the earlier of 18 months after , or 3 months after publication of certain final regulations by Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, see , set out as a note under .Pub.
